Energy from different sources
Deublin delivers advanced solutions that power both renewable energy systems and oil and gas applications. Combining optimized technologies for environmental sustainability with rugged designs built for maximum reliability, our products perform consistently even in the most demanding conditions – ensuring efficiency, durability, and dependable energy production across all sectors.
Learn More
Semiconductor
Semiconductor wafer fabrication businesses depend on Deublin's industry-specific expertise to provide custom engineered Rotary Unions and electrical slip rings.
Learn More
Paper and Printing
Deublin provides advanced rotary unions designed for the demanding requirements of the paper, printing, and packaging industries. From efficient, high-performance solutions for paper and corrugating to long-lasting rotary unions for printing and packaging applications, our technology ensures superior quality, reliability, and productivity.

Why We're Different
Deublin offers different sealing technologies to handle virtually any combination of media, rotating speed, and pressure. Find the best solution for your needs.
Pop-Off® Sealing Technology
Deublin's unrivaled Pop-Off® technology seals metalworking fluids, including MQL, up to 2000 psi but separates the seals when fluid pressure is turned off, thereby eliminating seal wear due to dry running.
Learn More
AutoSense® Sealing Technology
Deublin's patented AutoSense® technology is unique in sealing both conventional coolant as well as unlubricated air with no risk of premature seal damage from dry running.
Learn more
SpindleShield® Technology
Deublin's patented SpindleShield® technology signals the machine that spindle contamination is imminent, avoiding costly downtime.
Learn More
